config.title: Budżet konta #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'std_choice_list_hli #include "50200"
'std_openform_object_hli #include "50610"
function c10_ongetdata(byref pCtrl): c10_ongetdata=true pCtrl.value = page_.root.curKwota if not page_.root.pKonto is nothing then pCtrl.unit = page_.root.pKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot else pCtrl.unit = "" end if end function function c10_ondataentered(byref pCtrl, varValue) : c10_ondataentered=true page_.root.curKwota = varValue end function

page.body:
XFBEGIN
XFREQHUMANNAMECELL(Konto)
XF_REF_DISPLAY_TEXT_WITH_OPEN(40,pKonto)
XFREQREF(Budżet,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5BUDZET,40,pBudzet,strNazwa,1)
XFOPTHUMANNAMECELL(Plan) XFCURRENCY_CUSTOMCELL(10,20,#*gvar_price_prec)
Odniesienie
eOdniesienie
Obroty Wn Obroty Ma Saldo Wn Saldo Ma Saldo sald Wn Saldo sald Ma
XFEND
